description: §38.4 — a channel body declares a synced cell with the removed `@shared` modifier (`${ @shared count = 0 }`). The `@shared` marker was retired in v0.next (M19): cells inside a channel body auto-sync by virtue of placement, no marker required. Any `@shared` occurrence fires E-CHANNEL-SHARED-MODIFIER.
rationale: §38.4: the `@shared` modifier SHALL NOT appear in any v0.next/v0.3 source; auto-sync is BUILT-IN to the channel body. Any `@shared` occurrence SHALL emit E-CHANNEL-SHARED-MODIFIER (retiring E-CHANNEL-002). Use the V5-strict structural form `<name> = init`.
